name: Crockpot Meat Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the milk and the bread in a large mixing bowl; let stand until the bread has absorbed all the milk.
2. With two forks, break the bread into crumbs.
3. Beat the ground beef into the crumbs until well mixed.
4. Make a hollow in the center of the meat and break the eggs into it.
5. Beat the eggs a little; then grate the onions into the eggs.
6. Add salt, pepper, and mustard to the mixture.
7. Beat the eggs into the beef thoroughly.
8. Shape the mixture into a round cake and place it in the slow cooker.
9. Drain tomatoes and place them on top of the meat.
10. Cover and cook on Low for 5 to 7 hours.
11. Before serving, uncover the pot; turn the heat to High and bubble away some of the sauce until it is thick, not thin.
